## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content progress, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focusing on event registration keywords; 200+ articles published, generating 2,000 clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Plans to implement lead magnets and gated content for top-performing articles to increase conversions](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Team to create an executive summary of SEO program wins and growth for internal review](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Holiday schedules discussed; next meeting set for week of January 6th](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Milestones

  - [10 new articles published this week, reaching 200 total articles](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Achieved 2,000 clicks from GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Total clicks since project start reached 10,000](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Aiming for 25,000 clicks next, eventually 50,000](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

### Event Registration Content Strategy

  - [Focusing on 24 articles covering event registration topics](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Content buckets include form types, personalized events, late registration, challenges](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Plan to add 5-10 more articles to reach 30-35 topics in this category](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Next focus will be on event management content](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Performance and Traffic Analysis

  - [December 16th week showed 20-30% drop in existing article performance (147 clicks vs. 180-200 average)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Content refreshes consistently generating 40-50 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Monthly traffic increased from 5,000 clicks in November to projected 8,000 in December (9x growth since July)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Lead Generation Strategy

  - [Proposal to create gated content for top 20-30 performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Swoogo planning a gated 2025 event report](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing lead generation for ICP vs. non-ICP traffic](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content targeting potential future ICPs (e.g., junior event managers)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### SEO Program Review

  - [Request for 4-5 bullet point executive summary of biggest wins since program start](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Summary to include keyword rankings, top-performing articles, and organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Turnaround time: 1-2 days, targeting delivery by Friday or Monday](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### HubSpot Analytics Review

  - [2 MQLs generated directly from GrowthX blogs](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Increase in influenced form submissions (views of blog + later form submission)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Discussion on tracking methods and potential improvements (e.g., UTM parameters)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to finalize event registration content bucket and move focus to event management](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Create lead magnets and gated content for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Prateek to deliver high-level wins and learnings summary by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Full executive summary to be reviewed in the new year](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Team to implement UTM parameters and widgets for improved tracking](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for January 8th or 9th](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Continue publishing articles (10 more expected by end of next week)](https://fathom.video/share/J_WbwoxdxF8eYEy5Yjsszj6FURbGNTkg?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
